metadata.title: Teens Club Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Teens Club Account is a Mudarabah- based relationship where you will be the Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank will be the Manager (Mudarib). Your funds will be utilized by the Bank to provide Islamic financing to customers.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Meezan Teens Club Account Open a Teens Club Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print It’s Never too Early to Save! Teens Club Account is a Mudarabah- based relationship where you will be the Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank will be the Manager (Mudarib). Your funds will be utilized by the Bank to provide Islamic financing to customers. Meezan Bank is a keen Socially Responsible Organization and realizing this responsibility, the Teens Club Account aims to provide a forum to teens where their maturing minds are groomed in a modern yet Islamic way. The Teens Club Account provides a blend of fun learning with special focus on character and value building. Key Features Personalized Chequebook Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders Free Pay Orders Minimium Investment Open your account with Rs. 1000/- only Profit Higher Expected Returns Age Group Specially for teens of 12 to 18 years of age Halal Profits Halal profit every month Personalized Debit Card Free* Visa** Debit Card in different colors for boys and girls Internet and Online Banking Free Online Banking service and Internet Banking facility SMS Alerts SMS alerts on your transactions Great Gifts Exciting gifts*** on account opening * FREE for first issuance only Annual fee for subsequent years will be applicable as per SOC ** Paypak Card also available on this account, however charges as per SOC *** Gifts on account opening are subject to availability. Meezan Bank doesn't have any binding obligation to provide the gifts in case of unavailability. How Teens Club Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Teens Club Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 September Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Teens Club Account Monthly 0.45 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Club Account Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Teens Club Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
